creator: cyberleo@cyberleo.net
text:
twe(4) driver printf for TWE_STATUS_PCI_PARITY_ERROR message lacks
terminating newline.

Confirmed in CURRENT and 6x/7x branches.

Fix: Apply the included patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use a 3ware card, cause a PCI parity error, watch dmesg or console log.
